quick_skim.title: CFD-based Bayesian Optimization of Stirring Strategies in Stirred Tank Cultures of Pluripotent Stem Cell Spheroids
quick_skim.abstract: The suspension culture of pluripotent stem (PS) cells in stirred bioreactors poses a delicate balance between maintaining homogeneous cell dispersion and avoiding excessive shear stress that can compromise cell viability and pluripotency. In this study, we used computational fluid dynamics (CFD) coupled with a discrete particle method (DPM) to simulate iPS cell behavior in a 5 mL delta-impeller stirred tank. Our analysis revealed that upward flow at the tank bottom and downward flow at the top are critical for maintaining a stable suspension. To optimize the stirring protocol, we applied Bayesian optimization to identify a time-dependent stirring schedule that begins with a high-speed phase for resuspension, followed by a low-speed phase for sustained suspension with minimal hydrodynamic stress. The optimized schedule demonstrated improved suspension ratio and reduced slip velocity, indicating lower mechanical stress on cells. These findings provide engineering insights into scalable bioreactor operation, contributing to the design of robust iPS cell manufacturing systems.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: CFD and Bayesian optimization for stirred tank mixing can be transferred to battery slurry mixing equipment
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: CFD与贝叶斯优化搅拌策略可迁移至电池浆料混合设备
quick_skim.llm_evidence: CFD与贝叶斯优化搅拌策略可迁移至电池浆料混合设备
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: CFD与贝叶斯优化搅拌策略可迁移至电池浆料混合设备
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: This study uses CFD with discrete particle method to simulate cell suspension in stirred tank and applies Bayesian optimization to find optimal time-dependent stirring protocol, offering transferable methods for slurry mixing optimization.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 本研究采用计算流体动力学(CFD)结合离散颗粒法(DPM)模拟搅拌槽中诱导多能干细胞悬浮行为，并利用贝叶斯优化确定时间依赖的搅拌方案，以平衡悬浮均匀性与低剪切应力。该方法可推广至锂电正极浆料混合设备，如双行星搅拌釜，用于优化搅拌策略，提高浆料均一性与效率。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 本研究采用计算流体动力学(CFD)结合离散颗粒法(DPM)模拟搅拌槽中诱导多能干细胞悬浮行为，并利用贝叶斯优化确定时间依赖的搅拌方案，以平衡悬浮均匀性与低剪切应力。该方法可推广至锂电正极浆料混合设备，如双行星搅拌釜，用于优化搅拌策略，提高浆料均一性与效率。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: Papers central to 帮我查找锂电行业关于匀浆制备正极浆料方面有关实验设备，比如双行星搅拌釜、高速变频分散机，用来小试初筛以及中式放大的设备的一些论文。我要输出设备机理手册，用来帮我快速在工作中上手。, especially work that connects or combines: lithium ion battery cathode slurry preparation equipment; mixing mechanism in double planetary and dispersion mixer; slurry rheology in battery electrode manufacturing; processing of battery materials for electrodes; preparation of cathode slurry for lithium batteries; dual planetary mixer for battery slurry mixing; application of double planetary mixer in cathode slurry preparation; working principle of high speed frequency dispersion mixer for battery slurry; lab to pilot scale equipment selection for lithium ion cathode slurry; mechanism handbook for slurry mixing equipment in lithium battery industry.
